executive_summary: Build failure analysis for scib_new repository on main branch. Multiple consecutive build failures detected (attempts 1-3) with persistent workflow execution issues. The build process is failing consistently, indicating a systemic configuration or dependency problem rather than transient errors.

errors.title: GitHub Actions Workflow Dispatch Failure
errors.description: The GitHub Actions build workflow is failing to execute successfully. Multiple attempts (1, 2, 3) have resulted in build failures with generic error messages, suggesting a workflow configuration issue or environment setup problem.
errors.error_message: Build process failed - workflow execution returned failure status across multiple attempts
errors.root_cause: Potential causes: (1) Workflow YAML syntax or configuration errors, (2) Missing or incorrect environment variables/secrets, (3) Invalid workflow dispatch parameters, (4) Repository permissions or access issues, (5) Runner environment configuration problems
errors.impact: Complete build pipeline blockage - no successful builds can be executed, preventing code deployment and testing

errors.title: Build Workflow Execution Validation Failure
errors.description: The build workflow is being triggered successfully but fails during execution. The workflow status shows 'success' for triggering but the actual build result is 'failure', indicating a disconnect between workflow dispatch and execution.
errors.error_message: Workflow triggered successfully but build execution failed - status mismatch between dispatch and execution
errors.location: Workflow execution logs at action URLs: runs/22731367784, runs/22731530149, runs/22731593043
errors.root_cause: The workflow dispatch mechanism is functioning, but the actual build steps within the workflow are failing. This suggests: (1) Maven build configuration errors, (2) Missing dependencies or artifacts, (3) Test failures, (4) Compilation errors in source code, (5) Plugin execution failures
errors.impact: Build automation is non-functional - manual intervention required to diagnose and fix underlying build issues

errors.title: Potential Maven Dependency Resolution Failure
errors.description: Based on the persistent build failures and the nature of Maven-based projects, there is a high likelihood of dependency resolution issues. The build may be failing to download required artifacts or resolve version conflicts.
errors.error_message: Build failures suggest potential Maven dependency resolution problems - unable to fetch or resolve required artifacts
errors.location: Maven pom.xml configuration and dependency management
errors.root_cause: Possible causes: (1) Unreachable Maven repository URLs, (2) Missing or incorrect repository credentials, (3) Network connectivity issues from GitHub Actions runners, (4) Dependency version conflicts, (5) Missing parent POM or BOM imports
errors.impact: Build cannot proceed past dependency resolution phase - all downstream compilation and testing blocked

errors.title: Maven Plugin Execution Potential Failure
errors.description: The consistent build failures may be caused by Maven plugin execution errors. Common plugins like maven-compiler-plugin, maven-surefire-plugin, or custom plugins may be misconfigured or failing.
errors.error_message: Build process indicates potential Maven plugin execution failures during build lifecycle
errors.location: Maven build lifecycle - plugin execution phases
errors.root_cause: Potential issues: (1) Plugin version incompatibility with Maven version, (2) Missing plugin configuration parameters, (3) Plugin execution timeout, (4) Incompatible Java version for plugin execution, (5) Plugin dependency conflicts
errors.impact: Build lifecycle cannot complete - specific build phases (compile, test, package) may be blocked

recommendations.description: Access the action URL directly to view detailed workflow execution logs and identify the specific failure point
recommendations.automated_fix: Implement log aggregation and parsing to extract specific Maven error messages from workflow runs

recommendations.description: Review pom.xml for syntax errors, dependency conflicts, and plugin configurations
recommendations.automated_fix: Run 'mvn validate' and 'mvn dependency:tree' to identify configuration and dependency issues

recommendations.action: Check repository secrets and environment variables
recommendations.description: Ensure all required secrets (Maven repository credentials, API tokens) are properly configured in GitHub repository settings
recommendations.automated_fix: Implement secret validation checks in workflow before build execution

recommendations.description: Ensure the GitHub Actions runner is using compatible Java and Maven versions as specified in project requirements
recommendations.automated_fix: Add explicit version checks and setup steps in workflow YAML

compliance_notes.audit_trail: Error analysis performed on build attempts 1-3 for repository scib_new/main
compliance_notes.analysis_method: Automated error classification based on build failure patterns and workflow execution logs
compliance_notes.limitations: Detailed Maven error messages not available in current log format - requires direct GitHub Actions API access for full stack traces
